title: Computer Science Flashcards
description: A spaced repetition PWA for mastering CS fundamentals and acing coding interviews built on principles of cognitive science.
highlights: FSRS algorithm (superior to Anki's SM-2) adapts card intervals to personal learning patterns
Cross-device sync via Supabase, offline support as a PWA, and 30-day review history dashboard

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: My personal portfolio website, built with Astro and Tailwind CSS. Designed to showcase my experience, projects, and interests with a modern aesthetic and smooth animations.

title: Electronic Health Records
description: An electronic health records system enabling clinics to digitise patient records.
highlights: Role-based access control (RBAC) with separate patient and doctor portals for managing medical records
Soft-deletion mechanism with timestamp-based recovery to preserve medical record history, ensuring synchronized data visibility across patient and doctor account views.
